steps.title: Translate the percentage relationship
steps.content:
The statement 18 is 10% of what number means 18 equals 10% of an unknown value. We can write this as:

$$18 = 0.10 \times x$$

Since $0.10 = \frac{1}{10}$, we can rewrite this as:

$$18 = \frac{1}{10} \times x$$

steps.title: Solve for the unknown number
steps.content:
To isolate $x$, multiply both sides by 10:

$$x = 18 \times 10 = 180$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
